nodes.label: 3-Layer Lazy-Loaded Context Hierarchy
nodes.rationale: root CLAUDE.md (always loaded, identity+rules+router) -> draftN/CLAUDE.md (auto-loads in-draft, architecture+status) -> phaseN/CLAUDE.md (thin signpost to that phase's README). Load your tier and stop; dispatch the Explore subagent for heavy multi-file lookups instead of reading pages into the main session.
